hooks.command: echo '═══ SESSION v5 ═══' && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no git')" && echo "Modified: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files" && echo '───' && if [ -f CURRENT_TASK.md ] && [ -s CURRENT_TASK.md ]; then head -20 CURRENT_TASK.md; else echo 'No context found — run /auto-diagnose'; fi && echo '═══ Read CLAUDE.md now ═══'
echo 'ANTI-PROLIFERATION: Does this file serve a purpose no existing file covers?'

if [ -f package.json ]; then echo 'VERIFY: run tests/lint now'; elif [ -f requirements.txt ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then echo 'VERIFY: run pytest now'; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then echo 'VERIFY: run cargo check now'; fi

echo '═══ SESSION CLOSING ═══' && echo 'UPDATE: CURRENT_TASK.md (what done, next steps, blockers)' && echo 'UPDATE: EVOLUTION_LOG.md (what changed, what improved)' && echo 'CAPTURE: any new learnings to knowledge/' && echo '═══════════════════════'

echo '═══ CONTEXT COMPACTED ═══' && echo 'RE-READ: CLAUDE.md and CURRENT_TASK.md NOW' && echo 'RULES: verify after EVERY change, check knowledge/failures/ before new approaches' && if [ -f CURRENT_TASK.md ]; then echo '───' && head -10 CURRENT_TASK.md; fi && echo '═══════════════════════'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true
